title: More Warden Gamerules
description: This mod adds 14 new gamerules with which you can have bigger control of the warden.
body: This mod adds 14 new gamerules with which you can have a bigger control over the behavior of the warden. These gamerules allow for various adjustments, such as making the warden to be able to get inside of a boat, disable the darkness effect or his sonic boom attack or making it overpowered by making it deal 100 HP of damage or making its range hundreds of blocks.
